hero.label: Our Origin Story
hero.headline: The Genesis of Synaptic
hero.description: Architecting the invisible layer between human intent and machine execution. We don't just build nodes; we engineer evolution.

milestones.title: Initial Convergence
milestones.description: In a windowless lab in Zurich, our founders conceptualized a decentralized neural fabric that could bypass legacy latency bottlenecks.

milestones.title: Node Expansion
milestones.description: Scaling the network to 4,000 hyper-nodes across six continents, establishing the first global synaptic mesh.

items.title: Precision
items.description: Every calculation, every node handshake, and every protocol update is executed with nanosecond fidelity.

items.title: Autonomy
items.description: We believe in self-healing systems. Our infrastructure is designed to anticipate failure without human intervention.

items.title: Resilience
items.description: Built for the long tail of uncertainty. Our network maintains integrity through decentralized consensus.

items.title: Deep Focus Intervals
items.description: We operate on four-hour blocks of uninterrupted work. No Slack, no pings, just pure algorithmic architecture.

items.title: Radical Candor Protocols
items.description: Code reviews at XYN aren't polite; they're rigorous. We believe the fastest way to truth is through direct, objective scrutiny of logic.

items.title: The 10% Innovation Habit
items.description: Every Friday afternoon is dedicated to "Entropy Projects"—building things that shouldn't work to understand why they don't.

items.title: Asynchronous First
items.description: Meetings are a failure of documentation. We communicate via technical specs and clear version-controlled discourse.

cta.headline: Join the Synaptic Revolution.
cta.description: We are always looking for pioneers in cryptography, quantum computing, and distributed systems.
